message.content:
Saya sedang merancang penambahan modul RAWAT INAP dan IGD ke aplikasi HIS oftalmologi "Arumed" (instance Prima Vision) yang saat ini HANYA rawat jalan. Working dir: d:\Arumed-PrimaVision. Backend di `backend/` (Laravel 13.8), frontend di `arumed-frontend/` (Vue 3.5).

Tugasmu: telusuri SECARA MENDALAM bagaimana model encounter/kunjungan dan antrean saat ini bekerja, supaya saya tahu apa yang perlu diperluas. Cari & laporkan (dengan path file + nomor baris yang relevan):

1. **Model `Visit`** (`backend/app/Models/Visit.php`): semua kolom (lihat juga migration `visits` di backend/database/migrations/), enum/konstanta untuk `visit_type`, `classification`, `guarantor_type`, `current_station`, status. Apakah ada konsep tipe kunjungan (rawat jalan vs lainnya)? Apakah ada field yang mengindikasikan jenis pelayanan?

2. **Model `Queue`** (`backend/app/Models/Queue.php`): konstanta STATION (semua nilai), STATUS, PREFIX_MAP, helper prefixFor, scopes. Bagaimana satu visit bisa punya banyak queue.

3. **`QueueService`** (`backend/app/Services/QueueService.php`): khususnya method `resolveNextStation()` dan `advanceFromStation()` — bagaimana logika transisi antar stasiun ditentukan? Apakah hardcoded untuk alur rawat jalan? Bagaimana END_OF_FLOW dan NO_OP dipakai? Bagaimana `current_station` di-set?

4. **`AdmisiService`** (`backend/app/Services/AdmisiService.php`): method `registerVisit` — bagaimana visit dibuat, field apa yang di-set, dan bagaimana enqueue awal (TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS) terjadi.

5. Apakah ada referensi ke "rawat inap", "rawat jalan", "inap", "igd", "emergency", "rajal", "ranap", "bed", "kamar", "bangsal", "ward" di mana pun (backend & frontend)? Grep luas.

Laporkan temuan terstruktur per poin dengan path:baris. Jangan menulis/mengubah file apa pun — read-only.

145	    public function getKunjungan(array $filters): LengthAwarePaginator
146	    {
147	        $query = Visit::with([
148	            'patient',
149	            'insurer',
150	            'registeredBy',
151	            'doctorSchedule.employee:id,name',
152	            // Ambil semua queue hari ini (terbaru dulu) — mapper di bawah pilih
153	            // yang paling relevan: queue ADMISI kalau ada (walk-in kiosk), atau
154	            // queue terbaru di station saat ini (mis. TR-NNN untuk direct admisi).
155	            'queues' => fn ($q) => $q
156	                ->select(['id', 'visit_id', 'station', 'queue_number', 'status', 'created_at'])
157	                ->orderBy('created_at'),
158	        ]);
159	
160	        // Mode "Belum Selesai (semua tanggal)": tampilkan SEMUA kunjungan yang
161	        // masih berjalan (current_station != SELESAI) lintas-hari — untuk melihat
162	        // & membereskan ekor visit nyangkut. Selain mode ini, filter per-tanggal.
163	        if (! empty($filters['unfinished'])) {
164	            $query->where('current_station', '!=', 'SELESAI');
165	        } else {

170	            // "TRIASE" di UI mencakup stasiun paralel TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS.
171	            if ($filters['station'] === 'TRIASE') {
172	                $query->whereIn('current_station', ['TRIASE', 'REFRAKSIONIS']);
173	            } else {
174	                $query->where('current_station', $filters['station']);
175	            }
176	        }

179	            $query->where('guarantor_type', $filters['guarantor_type']);
180	        }

183	            $query->where('classification', $filters['classification']);
184	        }

187	            $search = $filters['search'];
188	            $query->whereHas('patient', fn ($q) => $q
189	                ->where('name', 'ilike', "%{$search}%")
190	                ->orWhere('no_rm', 'ilike', "%{$search}%")
191	                ->orWhere('nik', 'like', "%{$search}%")
192	            );

196	            ->orderByDesc('created_at')
197	            ->paginate($filters['per_page'] ?? 20);

199	        // Add general_consent_signed flag per visit
200	        $patientIds = collect($result->items())->pluck('patient_id')->unique()->values()->toArray();
201	
202	        if (! empty($patientIds)) {
203	            $signedPatients = PatientDocument::whereIn('patient_id', $patientIds)
204	                ->where('status', 'FINAL')
205	                ->whereHas('documentType', fn ($q) => $q
206	                    ->where('code', 'RM-0.1')
207	                    ->orWhere('name', 'ilike', '%general consent%')
208	                )
209	                ->pluck('patient_id')
210	                ->unique()
211	                ->flip();

213	            foreach ($result->items() as $visit) {

215	                $visit->general_consent_signed = isset($signedPatients[$visit->patient_id]);
216	            }
217	        } else {

227	    /**
228	     * Pilih nomor antrean yang paling relevan untuk ditampilkan di list:
229	     *  - Kalau pasien masih di stage ADMISI (walk-in kiosk), pakai queue ADMISI.
230	     *  - Kalau sudah lewat ADMISI (direct daftar atau sudah selesai admisi),
231	     *    pakai queue TR-NNN (TRIASE/REFRAKSIONIS share prefix).
232	     *  - Fallback: queue pertama yang tercipta untuk visit ini.
233	     */
234	    private function pickPrimaryQueueNumber(Visit $visit): string
235	    {
236	        $queues = $visit->queues;
237	        if ($queues->isEmpty()) return '—';
238	
239	        // Walk-in: prioritas queue ADMISI yang masih aktif/awal
240	        $admisi = $queues->firstWhere('station', 'ADMISI');
241	        if ($admisi && $visit->current_station === 'ADMISI') {
242	            return $admisi->queue_number;
243	        }
244	
245	        // Direct daftar: pakai queue TR (TRIASE/REFRAKSIONIS) yang pasti share nomor
246	        $tr = $queues->first(fn ($q) => in_array($q->station, ['TRIASE', 'REFRAKSIONIS'], true));
247	        if ($tr) return $tr->queue_number;
248	
249	        // Fallback: queue pertama
250	        return $queues->first()?->queue_number ?? '—';
251	    }

253	    public function getKunjunganById(string $id): Visit
254	    {
255	        return Visit::with([
256	            'patient',
257	            'insurer',
258	            'registeredBy',
259	            'queues',
260	            'visitCob',
261	            'nurseAssessment',

267	    public function cancelKunjungan(string $id): void
268	    {
269	        $visit = Visit::findOrFail($id);
270	
271	        // Tidak boleh cancel kalau sudah SELESAI (audit-trail integrity)
272	        if ($visit->current_station === 'SELESAI') {
273	            throw new \Exception('Kunjungan sudah selesai — tidak bisa dibatalkan.', 422);
274	        }
275	
276	        DB::transaction(function () use ($visit) {
277	            // Cancel semua antrean aktif (WAITING/CALLED/IN_PROGRESS) di station mana pun
278	            $visit->queues()
279	                ->whereIn('status', ['WAITING', 'CALLED', 'IN_PROGRESS'])
280	                ->update(['status' => 'CANCELLED']);
281	            $visit->delete(); // soft delete
282	        });
283	
284	        $this->log(
285	            auth('api')->id(),
286	            'CANCEL_KUNJUNGAN',
287	            Visit::class,
288	            $id,
289	            "Kunjungan dibatalkan (station: {$visit->current_station})"
290	        );
291	    }

294	    // PASIEN
295	    // =========================================================================

297	    /**
298	     * Search patient by NIK, BPJS number, no_rm, or name.
299	     */
300	    public function cariPasien(string $keyword): Collection
301	    {
302	        $patients = Patient::active()
303	            ->where(function ($q) use ($keyword) {
304	                $q->where('nik', 'like', "%{$keyword}%")
305	                    ->orWhere('bpjs_number', 'like', "%{$keyword}%")
306	                    ->orWhere('no_rm', 'ilike', "%{$keyword}%")
307	                    ->orWhere('name', 'ilike', "%{$keyword}%");
308	            })
309	            ->limit(15)
310	            ->get();
311	
312	        // Sertakan info kunjungan aktif (current_station != SELESAI) per pasien
313	        // supaya petugas TAHU sebelum daftar — guard registerVisit akan menolak
314	        // kalau pasien sudah punya visit aktif. Satu query batch (anti N+1).
315	        $activeVisits = Visit::whereIn('patient_id', $patients->pluck('id'))
316	            ->where('current_station', '!=', 'SELESAI')
317	            ->orderByDesc('created_at')
318	            ->get(['id', 'patient_id', 'no_registrasi', 'visit_date', 'current_station'])
319	            ->groupBy('patient_id');
320	
321	        $patients->each(function ($p) use ($activeVisits) {
322	            $av = $activeVisits->get($p->id)?->first();
323	            $p->active_visit = $av ? [
324	                'id'              => $av->id,
325	                'no_registrasi'   => $av->no_registrasi,
326	                'visit_date'      => optional($av->visit_date)->toDateString(),
327	                'current_station' => $av->current_station,
328	            ] : null;
329	        });
330	
331	        return $patients;
332	    }

337

343	            'gender'        => $data['gender'],

360	    /**
361	     * Simpan foto pasien (data URL base64 dari webcam/upload) ke disk `public`.
362	     * Nama file: {tanggal}-{nama}-{rand}.{ext} sesuai format yang diminta.
363	     * Mengembalikan path relatif untuk disimpan di kolom patients.photo_path,
364	     * atau null jika tidak ada foto / data tidak valid.
365	     */
366	    private function savePatientPhoto(?string $dataUrl, ?string $name): ?string
367	    {
368	        if (empty($dataUrl)) {
369	            return null;
370	        }
371	
372	        $ext = 'jpg';
373	        if (preg_match('/^data:image\/([a-zA-Z0-9.+-]+);base64,/', $dataUrl, $m)) {
374	            $ext     = strtolower($m[1]) === 'png' ? 'png' : 'jpg';
375	            $dataUrl = substr($dataUrl, strpos($dataUrl, ',') + 1);
376	        }
377	
378	        $binary = base64_decode($dataUrl, true);
379	        if ($binary === false || $binary === '') {
380	            return null;
381	        }
382	
383	        $slug = Str::slug($name ?: 'pasien') ?: 'pasien';
384	        $path = 'patients/' . today()->format('Y-m-d') . '-' . $slug . '-' . Str::random(6) . '.' . $ext;
385	
386	        Storage::disk('public')->put($path, $binary);
387	
388	        return $path;
389	    }

488	    /**
489	     * Render dokumen consent dari data form (pasien baru, belum ada Visit).
490	     * Return: ['html' => string, 'signature_fields' => [...], 'template_code' => string].
491	     */
492	    public function previewConsent(array $data): array
493	    {
494	        $code = $data['template_code'] ?: self::CONSENT_DEFAULT_CODE;
495	
496	        $template = DocumentTemplate::query()
497	            ->where('code', $code)
498	            ->where('is_active', true)
499	            ->whereNull('deprecated_at')
500	            ->first();
501	
502	        if (! $template) {
503	            throw new \Exception("Template consent '{$code}' tidak ditemukan / tidak aktif.", 404);
504	        }
505	
506	        // Map kolom form → nilai untuk binding db patient.*/visit.*
507	        $formValues = [
508	            'name'          => $data['name']          ?? null,
509	            'nik'           => $data['nik']           ?? null,
510	            'no_rm'         => $data['no_rm']          ?? null,
511	            'gender'        => $data['gender']         ?? null,
512	            'date_of_birth' => $data['date_of_birth'] ?? null,
513	            'address'       => $data['address']       ?? null,
514	            'phone'         => $data['phone']         ?? null,
515	            // visit.* bindings
516	            'visit_date'    => now()->format('d/m/Y'),
517	        ];
518	
519	        // TTD preview per signer_type (SVG).
520	        $sigByType = [];
521	        foreach (($data['signatures'] ?? []) as $sig) {
522	            $st  = $sig['signer_type'] ?? null;
523	            $svg = $sig['signature_svg'] ?? null;
524	            if ($st && is_string($svg) && $svg !== '') {
525	                $sigByType[$st] = $svg;
526	            }
527	        }
528	
529	        $html = $this->documentRenderer->renderForPreview(
530	            $template,
531	            $formValues,
532	            $data['static_payload'] ?? [],
533	            $sigByType,
534	        );
535	
536	        // Daftar field signature_canvas (untuk frontend tahu TTD apa yang diminta).
537	        $signatureFields = [];
538	        foreach (($template->field_schema['fields'] ?? []) as $f) {
539	            if (($f['type'] ?? null) === 'signature_canvas') {
540	                $signatureFields[] = [
541	                    'key'         => $f['key'] ?? null,
542	                    'label'       => $f['label'] ?? null,
543	                    'signer_type' => $f['signer_type'] ?? null,
544	                    'required'    => (bool) ($f['required'] ?? false),
545	                ];
546	            }
547	        }
548	
549	        return [
550	            'html'             => $html,
551	            'signature_fields' => $signatureFields,
552	            'template_code'    => $template->code,
553	        ];
554	    }

556	    public function registerVisit(array $data): Visit
557	    {
558	        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data) {
559	            // Resolve patient
560	            // Foto untuk kunjungan ini. File disimpan sekali, dirujuk oleh
561	            // visits.photo_path (riwayat per-kunjungan) DAN patients.photo_path (terbaru).
562	            $photoPath = null;
563	            if (! empty($data['patient_id'])) {
564	                $patient = Patient::findOrFail($data['patient_id']);
565	                if (! empty($data['photo'])) {
566	                    $photoPath = $this->savePatientPhoto($data['photo'], $patient->name);
567	                    $patient->update(['photo_path' => $photoPath]); // foto terbaru pasien
568	                }
569	            } else {
570	                $patient   = $this->storePasien($data);   // storePasien sudah simpan foto
571	                $photoPath = $patient->photo_path;
572	            }
573	
574	            $user = auth('api')->user();
575	
576	            // ─── Guard: cegah visit aktif ganda ──────────────────────────
577	            // Pasien tidak boleh punya >1 kunjungan yang masih berjalan
578	            // (current_station != SELESAI). Mencegah data visit rangkap saat
579	            // pasien lama (mis. nyangkut dari hari sebelumnya) didaftar ulang.
580	            // lockForUpdate utk anti-race dua registrasi bersamaan.
581	            $activeVisit = Visit::where('patient_id', $patient->id)
582	                ->where('current_station', '!=', 'SELESAI')
583	                ->orderByDesc('created_at')
584	                ->lockForUpdate()
585	                ->first();
586	            if ($activeVisit) {
587	                $stationLabel = $activeVisit->current_station ?? '-';
588	                $regLabel     = $activeVisit->no_registrasi ?? substr($activeVisit->id, 0, 8);
589	                $tgl          = optional($activeVisit->visit_date)->format('d/m/Y') ?? '-';
590	                throw new \Exception(
591	                    "Pasien {$patient->name} masih punya kunjungan aktif (No. {$regLabel}, tgl {$tgl}, di stasiun {$stationLabel}). "
592	                    . "Selesaikan atau batalkan kunjungan itu dulu sebelum mendaftarkan kunjungan baru.",
593	                    422
594	                );
595	            }
596	
597	            // ─── Preop Bedah: validasi & auto-shift jadwal ───────────────
598	            $visitType         = $data['visit_type'] ?? 'REGULAR';
599	            $surgeryScheduleId = null;
600	
601	            if ($visitType === 'PREOP_BEDAH') {
602	                if (empty($data['surgery_schedule_id'])) {
603	                    throw new \Exception('surgery_schedule_id wajib untuk visit_type PREOP_BEDAH.', 422);
604	                }
605	
606	                $schedule = SurgerySchedule::lockForUpdate()->find($data['surgery_schedule_id']);
607	                if (! $schedule) {
608	                    throw new \Exception('Jadwal bedah tidak ditemukan.', 404);
609	                }
610	
611	                // Schedule harus milik patient yg sama (lewat surgery_requests.visit.patient_id)
612	                $belongsToPatient = $schedule->surgeryRequests()
613	                    ->whereHas('visit', fn ($q) => $q->where('patient_id', $patient->id))
614	                    ->exists();
615	                if (! $belongsToPatient) {
616	                    throw new \Exception('Jadwal bedah ini bukan milik pasien yang dipilih.', 422);
617	                }
618	
619	                if (! in_array($schedule->status, ['SCHEDULED', 'IN_PROGRESS'])) {
620	                    throw new \Exception("Jadwal bedah status {$schedule->status} tidak boleh diproses preop.", 422);
621	                }
622	
623	                if ($schedule->scheduled_date->isBefore(today())) {
624	                    throw new \Exception('Jadwal bedah sudah lewat tanggal (di masa lalu).', 422);
625	                }
626	
627	                // Auto-shift: kalau jadwal bukan hari ini, geser ke hari ini + audit log
628	                if (! $schedule->scheduled_date->isToday()) {
629	                    $oldDate = $schedule->scheduled_date->copy();
630	                    $schedule->update(['scheduled_date' => today()]);
631	
632	                    SurgeryScheduleAuditLog::create([
633	                        'surgery_schedule_id' => $schedule->id,
634	                        'old_date'   => $oldDate,
635	                        'new_date'   => today(),
636	                        'reason'     => 'PREOP_WALKIN: pasien datang preop di luar jadwal asli',
637	                        'changed_by_id' => $user?->employee_id,
638	                        'changed_at' => now(),
639	                    ]);
640	                }
641	
642	                $surgeryScheduleId = $schedule->id;
643	            }
644	
645	            // Asuransi/Perusahaan non-BPJS → flag PENDING untuk diverifikasi billing
646	            // ke portal TPA secara paralel. UMUM/BPJS/SOSIAL → NONE (skip alur TPA).
647	            $needsTpaVerification = in_array(
648	                $data['guarantor_type'] ?? null,
649	                ['ASURANSI', 'PERUSAHAAN'],
650	                true
651	            );
652	
653	            $visit = Visit::create([
654	                'patient_id'         => $patient->id,
655	                'insurer_id'         => $data['insurer_id'] ?? null,
656	                'registered_by_id'   => $user->employee_id,
657	                'doctor_schedule_id' => $data['doctor_schedule_id'],
658	                'no_registrasi'      => $this->generateNoRegistrasi(),
659	                'photo_path'         => $photoPath,
660	                'visit_date'         => today(),
661	                'classification'     => $data['classification'],
662	                'visit_type'         => $visitType,
663	                'surgery_schedule_id' => $surgeryScheduleId,
664	                'current_station'    => 'TRIASE',       // skip ADMISI, langsung ke TR
665	                'guarantor_type'     => $data['guarantor_type'],
666	                'bpjs_booking_code'  => $data['bpjs_booking_code'] ?? null,
667	                'satusehat_sync_status' => 'PENDING',
668	                'insurance_verification_status' => $needsTpaVerification ? 'PENDING' : 'NONE',
669	            ]);
670	
671	            // Buat insurance_verifications awal (status PENDING) supaya billing langsung
672	            // bisa lihat row-nya di tab "Verifikasi Pending". Data kartu fisik (policy_number,
673	            // member_name, member_card_number) sudah diinput petugas admisi dari kartu.
674	            if ($needsTpaVerification && ! empty($data['insurer_id'])) {
675	                \App\Models\InsuranceVerification::create([
676	                    'visit_id'           => $visit->id,
677	                    'insurer_id'         => $data['insurer_id'],
678	                    'verified_by'        => null,
679	                    'status'             => 'PENDING',
680	                    'policy_number'      => $data['policy_number']      ?? null,
681	                    'member_name'        => $data['member_name']        ?? null,
682	                    'member_card_number' => $data['member_card_number'] ?? null,
683	                ]);
684	            }
685	
686	            // COB — penjamin kedua (opsional). Simpan ke visit_cob.
687	            $this->saveCob($visit->id, $data['cob'] ?? null);
688	
689	            // General Consent (opsional) — diteken pasien/wali di Admisi sebelum
690	            // konfirmasi. Non-fatal: gagal simpan consent TIDAK menggagalkan
691	            // registrasi visit (GC bersifat opsional & fleksibel).
692	            if (! empty($data['consent'])) {
693	                try {
694	                    $this->saveConsentDocument($visit, $patient, $data['consent']);
695	                } catch (\Throwable $e) {
696	                    \Log::warning('Gagal simpan General Consent saat registrasi visit', [
697	                        'visit_id' => $visit->id,
698	                        'error'    => $e->getMessage(),
699	                    ]);
700	                }
701	            }
702	
703	            // Langsung enqueue TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS paralel dengan nomor antrean TR-NNN
704	            // yang shared (mengikuti pattern QueueService::advanceFromStation).
705	            $sharedNumber = $this->queueService->generateQueueNumber('TRIASE');
706	            $this->queueService->enqueue($visit->id, 'TRIASE', $sharedNumber);
707	            $this->queueService->enqueue($visit->id, 'REFRAKSIONIS', $sharedNumber);
708	
709	            $this->log(
710	                $user->id,
711	                'DAFTAR_KUNJUNGAN',
712	                Visit::class,
713	                $visit->id,
714	                "Kunjungan baru (direct admisi → TR): {$patient->name} ({$data['guarantor_type']}) — {$sharedNumber['queue_number']}"
715	            );
716	
717	            return $visit->load(['patient', 'queues']);
718	        });
719	    }

721	    /**
722	     * Simpan General Consent yang sudah diteken pasien/wali di Admisi sebagai
723	     * PatientDocument FINALIZED + signature. Dipanggil DALAM transaksi
724	     * registerVisit (visit & patient sudah ada).
725	     *
726	     * Alur (mengikuti pola FormRegistryService::finalize + SignatureService):
727	     *   1. Cari template aktif by code.
728	     *   2. Buat PatientDocument status DRAFT.
729	     *   3. Capture tiap signature (SignatureService menolak kalau sudah FINALIZED).
730	     *   4. Render HTML + embed SVG signature dari record yang baru disimpan.
731	     *   5. Gzip → simpan, set status FINALIZED + hash.
732	     *
733	     * @param array{template_code?:string, signatures?:array, static_payload?:array} $consent
734	     */
735	    private function saveConsentDocument(Visit $visit, Patient $patient, array $consent): void
736	    {
737	        $code = $consent['template_code'] ?? self::CONSENT_DEFAULT_CODE;
738	
739	        $template = DocumentTemplate::query()
740	            ->where('code', $code)
741	            ->where('is_active', true)
742	            ->whereNull('deprecated_at')
743	            ->first();
744	        if (! $template) {
745	            throw new \RuntimeException("Template consent '{$code}' tidak ditemukan.");
746	        }
747	
748	        $user = auth('api')->user();
749	
750	        // 1. PatientDocument DRAFT.
751	        $doc = PatientDocument::create([
752	            'patient_id'         => $patient->id,
753	            'visit_id'           => $visit->id,
754	            'document_type_id'   => $template->document_type_id,
755	            'status'             => 'DRAFT',
756	            'created_by_station' => 'ADMISI',
757	            'template_code'      => $template->code,
758	            'template_version'   => $template->version,
759	            'signatures'         => ['static_payload' => $consent['static_payload'] ?? []],
760	        ]);
761	
762	        // 2. Capture signatures.
763	        foreach (($consent['signatures'] ?? []) as $sig) {
764	            $signerType = $sig['signer_type'] ?? null;
765	            if (! $signerType) continue;
766	
767	            $capture = [
768	                'patient_document_id'  => $doc->id,
769	                'signer_type'          => $signerType,
770	                'signature_svg'        => $sig['signature_svg'] ?? null,
771	                'signature_png_base64' => $sig['signature_png_base64'] ?? null,
772	                'biometric_metadata'   => $sig['biometric_metadata'] ?? null,
773	                'audit_log'            => $sig['audit_log'] ?? [],
774	                'captured_by_facilitator_user_id' => $user?->id,
775	            ];
776	
777	            // Identity routing — pasien = signer_patient_id; witness/guardian = external.
778	            if ($signerType === 'patient') {
779	                $capture['signer_patient_id'] = $patient->id;
780	            } elseif (in_array($signerType, ['witness', 'guardian'], true)) {
781	                $ext = $sig['external_identity'] ?? null;
782	                // Fallback nama supaya lolos validasi SignatureService (butuh 'nama').
783	                if (! is_array($ext) || empty($ext['nama'])) {
784	                    $ext = ['nama' => $ext['nama'] ?? 'Saksi'];
785	                }
786	                $capture['signer_external_identity'] = $ext;
787	            }
788	
789	            $this->signatureService->capture($capture);
790	        }
791	
792	        // 3. Render + embed signature dari record yang baru disimpan.
793	        $payload = $doc->signatures['static_payload'] ?? [];
794	        $html = $this->documentRenderer->render($template, $visit->id, $payload);
795	
796	        $schema   = $template->field_schema ?? [];
797	        $fieldMap = $this->documentRenderer->extractSignatureFieldMap($schema);
798	        $sigByType = \App\Models\DocumentSignature::query()
799	            ->where('patient_document_id', $doc->id)
800	            ->get()
801	            ->keyBy('signer_type');
802	        $html = $this->documentRenderer->embedSignatures($html, $fieldMap, $sigByType->all());
803	
804	        // 4. Finalize. Simpan HTML plain di `rendered_html` (longText) — BUKAN
805	        //    gzip ke `rendered_html_gz`. Kolom _gz bertipe bytea di Postgres dan
806	        //    binding string hasil gzcompress() ditolak ('invalid byte sequence
807	        //    for encoding UTF8'). getSnapshot() sudah punya fallback ke plain
808	        //    rendered_html, jadi tetap kompatibel. Dokumen GC kecil (~2KB) →
809	        //    gzip tidak memberi keuntungan berarti.
810	        $sigIds = $sigByType->pluck('signature_id')->sort()->values()->all();
811	        $hash   = hash('sha256', $html . '|' . implode(',', $sigIds) . '|' . $doc->id);
812	
813	        $doc->rendered_html        = $html;
814	        $doc->rendered_html_gz     = null;
815	        $doc->status               = 'FINALIZED';
816	        $doc->finalized_at         = now();
817	        $doc->final_integrity_hash = $hash;
818	        $doc->save();
819	    }

825	    /**
826	     * Update Visit walk-in (dari kiosk) dengan data registrasi lengkap.
827	     *
828	     * Dua skenario:
829	     *  A. patient_id diisi (pasien lama) → ganti visit.patient_id ke pasien real,
830	     *     soft-delete placeholder patient
831	     *  B. patient_id kosong (pasien baru) → update placeholder patient dengan
832	     *     data baru (NIK, nama, gender, DOB, dll) DAN generate no_rm. Kiosk hanya
833	     *     menerbitkan nomor antrean — no_rm baru lahir saat pasien resmi terdaftar.
834	     *
835	     * Pre-condition:
836	     *  - Visit harus masih placeholder (patient.name === 'Belum Terdaftar')
837	     *  - Visit harus masih di station ADMISI
838	     */
839	    public function daftarkanWalkIn(string $visitId, array $data): Visit
840	    {
841	        return DB::transaction(function () use ($visitId, $data) {
842	            $visit = Visit::with('patient')->lockForUpdate()->findOrFail($visitId);
843	
844	            if ($visit->patient->name !== 'Belum Terdaftar') {
845	                throw new \Exception('Kunjungan ini bukan walk-in dari kiosk (sudah terdaftar).', 422);
846	            }
847	            if ($visit->current_station !== 'ADMISI') {
848	                throw new \Exception('Pasien sudah melewati admisi, tidak bisa diubah.', 422);
849	            }

5	const VALID_STATIONS = ['admisi', 'perawat', 'refraksi', 'dokter', 'penunjang', 'bedah', 'farmasi', 'kasir']

7	export const useQueueStore = defineStore('queue', () => {
8	  // ─── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9	  const queues          = ref([])         // antrian untuk station aktif
10	  const currentStation  = ref(null)       // station aktif user yang login
11	  const calledQueue     = ref(null)       // pasien yang sedang dipanggil
12	  const loading         = ref(false)
13	  const error           = ref(null)
14	
15	  // ─── Getters ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
16	  const waitingCount    = computed(() => queues.value.filter((q) => q.status === 'WAITING').length)
17	  const inProgressCount = computed(() => queues.value.filter((q) => q.status === 'IN_PROGRESS').length)
18	  const completedCount  = computed(() => queues.value.filter((q) => q.status === 'COMPLETED').length)
19	
20	  const waitingList   = computed(() => queues.value.filter((q) => q.status === 'WAITING'))
21	  const activeQueue   = computed(() => queues.value.find((q) => q.status === 'IN_PROGRESS') ?? null)
22	  const nextInLine    = computed(() => waitingList.value[0] ?? null)
23	
24	  // ─── Actions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
25	
26	  function setStation(station) {
27	    if (!VALID_STATIONS.includes(station)) {
28	      console.warn(`[queueStore] invalid station: ${station}`)
29	      return
30	    }
31	    currentStation.value = station
32	  }
33	
34	  async function fetchQueue(station = null) {
35	    const target = station ?? currentStation.value
36	    if (!target) return
37	
38	    loading.value = true
39	    error.value   = null
40	
41	    try {
42	      const { data } = await queueApi[target]()
43	      queues.value = data.data ?? []
44	    } catch (err) {
45	      error.value = err.response?.data?.message ?? 'Gagal memuat antrian'
46	    } finally {
47	      loading.value = false
48	    }
49	  }
50	
51	  async function panggilAntrian(queueId, station = null) {
52	    const target = station ?? currentStation.value
53	    if (!target) throw new Error('Station belum dipilih')
54	
55	    loading.value = true
56	
57	    try {
58	      const { data } = await queueApi.panggil(target, queueId)
59	
60	      // Update local state
61	      const idx = queues.value.findIndex((q) => q.id === queueId)
62	      if (idx !== -1) {
63	        queues.value[idx] = data.data
64	      }
65	
66	      calledQueue.value = data.data
67	      return data.data
68	    } catch (err) {
69	      error.value = err.response?.data?.message ?? 'Gagal memanggil pasien'
70	      throw err
71	    } finally {
72	      loading.value = false
73	    }
74	  }
75	
76	  async function selesaiAntrian(queueId, station = null) {
77	    const target = station ?? currentStation.value
78	    if (!target) throw new Error('Station belum dipilih')
79	
80	    loading.value = true
81	
82	    try {
83	      const { data } = await queueApi.selesai(target, queueId)
84	
85	      const idx = queues.value.findIndex((q) => q.id === queueId)
86	      if (idx !== -1) {
87	        queues.value[idx] = data.data
88	      }
89	
90	      if (calledQueue.value?.id === queueId) {
91	        calledQueue.value = null
92	      }
93	
94	      return data.data
95	    } catch (err) {
96	      error.value = err.response?.data?.message ?? 'Gagal menyelesaikan antrian'
97	      throw err
98	    } finally {
99	      loading.value = false
100	    }
101	  }
102	
103	  // Poll setiap 30 detik (bisa diganti WebSocket Reverb nanti)
104	  let _pollInterval = null
105	
106	  function startPolling(station = null, intervalMs = 30_000) {

111

116	    }
117	  }
118	
119	  function clearQueue() {
120	    queues.value   = []
121	    calledQueue.value = null
122	  }
123	
124	  return {

## LAPORAN TELUSURI MENDALAM: Model Visit, Queue, dan Service Flow di Arumed (Rawat Jalan Only)

Berikut adalah analisis terstruktur bagaimana sistem encounter/kunjungan dan antrean saat ini bekerja:

### 1. MODEL `Visit` - Struktur & Enum

**File: `backend/app/Models/Visit.php`**

#### Kolom (dari Visit model & migrations):

- **`visit_type`** membedakan:

### 3. `QueueService` - Logika Transisi Antar Stasiun

#### Method `resolveNextStation(Visit $visit, string $fromStation)` — lines 424-437
Kontrak return:
- **string** (single station name) → buat 1 queue baru di station itu
- **array<string>** (multi station) → buat multiple queue paralel (TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS)
- **null** → gate belum passed, throw error (tidak boleh selesaikan antrian)
- **END_OF_FLOW** (`'__END__'`) → pasien pulang, set `current_station='SELESAI'` (line 329)
- **NO_OP** (`'__NOOP__'`) → tutup queue sekarang, jangan enqueue baru, current_station tetap (line 331)

Logic per station (lines 426-436):
```php
public function resolveNextStation(Visit $visit, string $fromStation): string|array|null
{
    return match ($fromStation) {
        Queue::STATION_ADMISI       => [Queue::STATION_TRIASE, Queue::STATION_REFRAKSIONIS],  // line 427
        Queue::STATION_TRIASE       => $this->nextAfterTriaseOrRefraksi($visit),              // line 428
        Queue::STATION_REFRAKSIONIS => $this->nextAfterTriaseOrRefraksi($visit),              // line 429
        Queue::STATION_DOKTER       => $this->nextAfterDokter($visit),                        // line 430
        Queue::STATION_PENUNJANG    => $this->nextAfterPenunjang($visit),                    // line 431
        Queue::STATION_BEDAH        => Queue::STATION_KASIR,                                  // line 432
        Queue::STATION_KASIR        => $this->nextAfterKasir($visit),                        // line 433
        Queue::STATION_FARMASI      => self::END_OF_FLOW,                                    // line 434 → pulang
        default                     => null,
    };
}
```

### RINGKASAN STRUKTUR ALUR VISIT CURRENT (RAWAT JALAN ONLY)

```
Kiosk Walk-In:
  POST /anjungan/tiket-umum
  → Create Patient(name='Belum Terdaftar', no_rm=null)
  → Create Visit(current_station='ADMISI', visit_type='REGULAR')
  → Create Queue ADMISI (status WAITING)
  → Return queue_number (A-NNN)

Petugas Admisi — Daftar:
  POST /admisi/daftarkan-walk-in/{visitId}
  → Validasi: queue ADMISI sudah CALLED
  → Resolve patient: masukkan pasien real / ubah placeholder
  → advanceFromStation(ADMISI) → auto-enqueue TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS (TR-NNN share nomor)
  → visit.current_station = TRIASE

Atau Direct Daftar (tidak kiosk):
  POST /kunjungan/daftar
  → Create Patient (baru atau existing)
  → Create Visit(current_station='TRIASE', visit_type='REGULAR'|'PREOP_BEDAH')
  → Create Queue TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS paralel (TR-NNN share nomor)
  → Langsung skip ADMISI

Perawat (TRIASE):
  GET /perawat/antrian
  → Load queue TRIASE hari ini, urut queue_sequence
  → Panggil: POST /antrian/{queueId}/panggil → status WAITING→CALLED
  → Mulai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/mulai → status CALLED→IN_PROGRESS
  → [Asesmen Triase...]
  → Selesai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/selesai → resolveNextStation('TRIASE')
    - Cek triase_completed_at & refraksi_completed_at finalized?
    - Jika TIDAK: throw error (gate belum passed)
    - Jika visit_type='PREOP_BEDAH': return NO_OP (tunggu tombol Kirim ke Bedah)
    - Jika visit_type='REGULAR': cek queue DOKTER ada?
      - Jika TIDAK: enqueue DOKTER baru, visit.current_station=DOKTER, return DOKTER
      - Jika ya: return NO_OP (partner REFRAKSIONIS akan trigger)

Refraksionis (REFRAKSIONIS):
  [Mirror perawat logic, selesai trigger ke DOKTER or NO_OP]

Dokter (DOKTER):
  GET /dokter/antrian
  → Load queue DOKTER hari ini, urut queue_sequence
  → Panggil → Mulai → [Periksa & buat resep/order/surgery...]
  → Selesai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/selesai → resolveNextStation('DOKTER')
    - Ada DiagnosticOrder REQUESTED/IN_PROGRESS? → enqueue PENUNJANG
    - Ada planning BEDAH & jadwal hari INI? → enqueue BEDAH
    - Else → enqueue KASIR

Penunjang (PENUNJANG):
  [Lakukan pemeriksaan...]
  → Selesai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/selesai → resolveNextStation('PENUNJANG')
    - Cek queue DOKTER pasien masih hidup?
    - Jika ya: return NO_OP (jangan duplikat, PenunjangService nanti naik baris lama)
    - Jika tidak: enqueue DOKTER baru

BEDAH (BEDAH):
  [Jika visit_type='PREOP_BEDAH': tombol manual "Kirim ke Bedah" via PerawatService]
  [Operasi...]
  → Selesai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/selesai → resolveNextStation('BEDAH')
    - → enqueue KASIR

Kasir (KASIR):
  [Proses pembayaran...]
  → Selesai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/selesai → resolveNextStation('KASIR')
    - Ada Prescription DRAFT/SUBMITTED/DISPENSING? → enqueue FARMASI
    - Else → return END_OF_FLOW

Farmasi (FARMASI):
  [Dispensing resep...]
  → Selesai: POST /antrian/{queueId}/selesai → resolveNextStation('FARMASI')
    - → END_OF_FLOW
    - → visit.current_station = SELESAI → PULANG
```
